title: Pick the right realtime API: WebSockets vs SSE vs long
meta_description: Compare WebSocket, SSE and long polling with real numbers on memory, latency and cost — pick the right realtime transport for your product before you ship. Benchmarks from localhost and $5 DigitalOcean droplet included.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets for everything.

Then they measure latency and costs.

SSE was 40% cheaper and only 5ms slower.

Here is what actually paid off 👇
